change_note: tmux control-panel launch via notebook v0.9
model_architecture_summary:
topology_id=distance_regressor_tri_stream_yaw
model_class_name=DistanceRegressorTriStreamYaw
architecture_variant=tri_stream_yaw_v0_1
DistanceRegressorTriStreamYaw(
  (geom_mlp): Sequential(
    (0): Linear(in_features=10, out_features=64, bias=True)
    (1): ReLU(inplace=True)
    (2): Linear(in_features=64, out_features=64, bias=True)
    (3): ReLU(inplace=True)
    (4): Linear(in_features=64, out_features=32, bias=True)
    (5): ReLU(inplace=True)
  )
  (distance_cnn): Sequential(
    (0): Conv2d(1, 16, kernel_size=(3, 3), stride=(2, 2), padding=(1, 1))
    (1): GroupNorm(8, 16, eps=1e-05, affine=True)
    (2): ReLU(inplace=True)
    (3): Conv2d(16, 32, kernel_size=(3, 3), stride=(2, 2), padding=(1, 1))
    (4): GroupNorm(8, 32, eps=1e-05, affine=True)
    (5): ReLU(inplace=True)
    (6): Conv2d(32, 64, kernel_size=(3, 3), stride=(2, 2), padding=(1, 1))
    (7): GroupNorm(8, 64, eps=1e-05, affine=True)
    (8): ReLU(inplace=True)
    (9): Conv2d(64, 128, kernel_size=(3, 3), stride=(2, 2), padding=(1, 1))
    (10): GroupNorm(8, 128, eps=1e-05, affine=True)
    (11): ReLU(inplace=True)
    (12): Conv2d(128, 128, kernel_size=(3, 3), stride=(2, 2), padding=(1, 1))
    (13): GroupNorm(8, 128, eps=1e-05, affine=True)
    (14): ReLU(inplace=True)
    (15): AdaptiveAvgPool2d(output_size=(1, 1))
    (16): Flatten(start_dim=1, end_dim=-1)
  )
  (orientation_cnn): Sequential(
    (0): Conv2d(1, 16, kernel_size=(3, 3), stride=(2, 2), padding=(1, 1))
    (1): GroupNorm(8, 16, eps=1e-05, affine=True)
    (2): ReLU(inplace=True)
    (3): Conv2d(16, 32, kernel_size=(3, 3), stride=(2, 2), padding=(1, 1))
    (4): GroupNorm(8, 32, eps=1e-05, affine=True)
    (5): ReLU(inplace=True)
    (6): Conv2d(32, 64, kernel_size=(3, 3), stride=(2, 2), padding=(1, 1))
    (7): GroupNorm(8, 64, eps=1e-05, affine=True)
    (8): ReLU(inplace=True)
    (9): Conv2d(64, 128, kernel_size=(3, 3), stride=(2, 2), padding=(1, 1))
    (10): GroupNorm(8, 128, eps=1e-05, affine=True)
    (11): ReLU(inplace=True)
    (12): Conv2d(128, 128, kernel_size=(3, 3), stride=(2, 2), padding=(1, 1))
    (13): GroupNorm(8, 128, eps=1e-05, affine=True)
    (14): ReLU(inplace=True)
    (15): AdaptiveAvgPool2d(output_size=(1, 1))
    (16): Flatten(start_dim=1, end_dim=-1)
  )
  (fusion_trunk): Sequential(
    (0): Linear(in_features=288, out_features=128, bias=True)
    (1): ReLU(inplace=True)
    (2): Identity()
    (3): Linear(in_features=128, out_features=64, bias=True)
    (4): ReLU(inplace=True)
    (5): Identity()
  )
  (distance_head): Linear(in_features=64, out_features=1, bias=True)
  (orientation_head): Linear(in_features=64, out_features=2, bias=True)
)

topology_metadata.note: Distance plus yaw multitask topology with distance image, orientation image, and geometry streams.
